title: quercus subspathulata
intro: Quercus subspathulata, also known as the Chinese cork tree, is a species of deciduous tree native to China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate various health conditions. The health benefits of Quercus subspathulata include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Quercus subspathulata often come in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
